random_control.reading: no 'last region' under a random order; residual scatters (bottom-residual ~0.5), so localization is a property of the sequential decomposition, not the board

row_major.reading: median frontier of unsolved boards >0.5 and bottom-residual >0.5 => hard region localizes to the last (bottom) band

measures: localization only (evidence-chain points 1-2); NOT the exact-window or too-coupled halves
